hero.badge: For growing businesses without a full HR team
hero.title: AI Resume Ranking for Busy SMBs
hero.subtitle: Save hours of manual review and get a shortlist of the most relevant candidates in just a few minutes.

stats.title: Built for businesses that move fast
stats.subtitle: No dedicated HR team? No problem. Qorva AI gives small and growing businesses the hiring power of a full recruitment team — at a fraction of the cost.

item1.label: Less time on screening
item1.description: Stop reading every resume. Qorva AI ranks applicants instantly so you jump straight to the best fits.

item2.label: Faster time-to-hire
item2.description: Go from job post to shortlist in minutes, not days. Fill roles before your competitors do.

item3.label: Resumes processed per hour
item3.description: Handle a surge in applications without hiring a recruiter or slowing down operations.

item4.label: Criteria-based scoring
item4.description: Objective, skills-first evaluation — no gut feeling, no bias, just the best match for your role.

features.title: Everything You Need to Hire Without the Overhead
features.subtitle: No ATS. No recruiter. Just drop your resumes and let Qorva AI do the work.

parsing.title: Instant Resume Parsing
parsing.description: Drag and drop up to hundreds of resumes at once. Qorva AI extracts every candidate's key info automatically — no spreadsheets, no manual data entry, no wasted time.

matching.title: Smart Candidate Ranking
matching.description: Tell Qorva AI what the role requires, and it instantly ranks every applicant by fit. You get a clear, prioritized shortlist with an explanation for each score — so you only talk to the right people.

aiChat.title: Ask Anything About a Candidate
aiChat.description: Not sure if someone's a fit? Just ask. AI Resume Chat lets you query any candidate profile in plain language — 'Does this person have B2B sales experience?' — and get an instant, honest answer. No more rereading the same resume three times.

criteria.title: Custom Role Criteria
criteria.description: Define what matters most for each role — required skills, years of experience, specific qualifications — and Qorva AI ranks every candidate accordingly, with a clear explanation for each score.

saveTime.title: Hire in Hours, Not Weeks
saveTime.description: When you're running a business, every day a role is open costs you money. Qorva AI cuts screening from days to minutes — so you move fast and stay focused.

reduceCost.title: No Recruiter Fees
reduceCost.description: Avoid expensive recruitment agencies or building an internal HR function too early. Get the same quality shortlisting at a fraction of the cost.

accuracy.title: Stop Guessing, Start Knowing
accuracy.description: Bad hires are expensive. Qorva AI's objective, criteria-based scoring helps you make confident decisions based on actual skills — not gut feeling or resume formatting.

fairness.title: Fair by Design
fairness.description: Every candidate is scored on the same criteria. No unconscious bias, no skipped profiles — just a level playing field that helps you find the best person for the job.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No training. No onboarding call. No complicated setup.

account.title: Create a free account
account.description: Sign up in seconds — no credit card, no sales call, no IT team required.

upload.title: Add your job and resumes
upload.description: Describe the role you're hiring for and drop in your applicants. Qorva AI handles the rest.

insights.title: Get your shortlist
insights.description: Instantly see every candidate ranked by fit, with a clear explanation for each score. Just interview the top picks.

trust.title: Secure, Compliant, and Ready to Use
trust.subtitle: You're handling real people's data. We take that seriously — so you don't have to worry about it.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.description: Full compliance with EU data protection regulations. Store and process candidate data with confidence.

security.title: Secure by Default
security.description: End-to-end encryption and secure data storage — no setup required on your end.

fairness.title: AI Fairness Tested
fairness.description: Our AI scores candidates on job-relevant criteria only — no demographic signals, ever.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Candidate data is never sold or shared. Deleted on request, no questions asked.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

item1.question: Do I need an ATS or HR software to use Qorva AI?
item1.answer: No. Qorva AI is a standalone tool built for businesses that don't want the complexity of a full ATS. Just create an account, upload your resumes and job description, and you'll have a ranked shortlist in minutes — no integrations or IT setup needed.

item2.question: How quickly can I start screening candidates?
item2.answer: Immediately. Sign up, upload your resumes, and Qorva AI starts ranking candidates right away. Most users have a shortlist ready within minutes of their first login.

item3.question: Is Qorva AI only for high-volume hiring?
item3.answer: Not at all. Whether you're hiring one person or fifty, Qorva AI saves you time. It's designed for businesses that want to make fast, confident hiring decisions without spending hours reviewing every application.

item4.question: Can I define what matters most for my specific role?
item4.answer: Yes. You tell Qorva AI what to prioritize — required skills, years of experience, specific qualifications — and it ranks every candidate accordingly. Each score comes with a clear explanation so you always know why someone ranked where they did.

item5.question: Is candidate data secure and GDPR compliant?
item5.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Qorva AI is GDPR compliant — candidate data is never sold or shared with third parties, and can be deleted at any time on request.

item6.question: Is there a free trial?
item6.answer: Yes — 7 days, full access. Upload real candidates for a real role and see exactly what Qorva AI can do before you commit to a plan.
